description: Foundations Patch 1 (2 May 2024) — Turkish/Arabic chat channels, Starter Town randomization, Albion Europe world size, Vanity Skin Transfers, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Swords), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Turkish and Arabic chat channels added
Starter Town default selection after tutorial is now randomized (previously defaulted to Swamp Cross, causing overcrowding)
Albion Europe world size increased partially
[Albion Europe] The crafting capacity regeneration of buildings in cities has been increased
sections.searchable_text: Turkish Arabic chat channels Starter Town randomized Swamp Cross Albion Europe world size crafting capacity regeneration buildings cities

sections.heading: Vanity Skin Transfers
sections.description: A number of vanity skins are being made account-wide so that they can be used on the Albion Europe server.
sections.searchable_text: Vanity Skin Transfers account-wide Albion Europe server

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Arcane Staffs Starfall Astral Staff Swords Limitbreaker Infinity Blade

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Starfall Astral Staff Resilience Penetration Buff 35% 50%

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Limitbreaker Infinity Blade Cooldown 25s 20s damage 35% silence slow 70% 1.5s First hit 70 105 Second 140 105 Standtime 1.2s 1s

changes.raw_text: Limitbreaker: Cooldown: 25s → 20s. All damage now increased by 35% (independent of channel duration, max was 25% before). Removed silence on first hit. Instead, first hit slows enemies by 70% for 1.5s (independent of Heroic Charges). First hit damage: 70 → 105; Second hit damage: 140 → 105; Standtime: 1.2s → 1s.
notes: Damage increase while channeling reworked: all damage now increased by 35% independent of channel duration (was max 25% before)
Instead, first hit now slows enemies by 70% for 1.5s (independent of Heroic Charges)

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where Undead Arrows (Whispering Bow) could trigger Knightfall Abbey's Blessing of Compassion buff twice
Fixed issue where Forest of Spears (Spears) used the incorrect animation
Fixed issue with Onslaught (Hand of Justice) not working correctly against mobs
Fixed issue where Lunging Strike (Spears) range indicator was smaller than intended
Fixed issue where Knightfall Abbey tooltips were not displayed on the minimap
Fixed issue where Power Cores would not be visible on the minimap in certain regions
Fixed issue where Weakened Wisp Sanctuaries would remain on the minimap after dropping a Weakened Wisp
Fixed issue where Hellgate progression bar was not displayed
Fixed issue where some UIs would remain visible after opening a different UI
Fixed issue where ingame mails could not be deleted after opening and closing them
Fixed issue where Territory Activity Chest could not be interacted with when it should be
Fixed issue where crafting Crystal Weapons would not fill Crafting Journals
Fixed issue where crafting Siege Banners would not fill Tinker's Journals
[Mobile] Fixed issue where Siege Banner notifications were displayed
[Mobile] Fixed issues with profanity filters not working correctly
[Mobile] Fixed issues with minimap tooltips sometimes not displaying
